Case# vmnet_return_t.VMNET_INVALID_ARGUMENT

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
case VMNET_INVALID_ARGUMENT
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_return_t/vmnet_invalid_argument#Discussion)

Indicates failure due to an invalid argument.
